16.name: MIT9313 cluster 16 (2 genes)
16.functional_description: Contains sRNAs Yfr2 and Yfr4, which are small non-coding RNAs differentially expressed under iron stress.

supporting_quotes.quote: We observed differential expression of several, albeit different, sRNAs in MED4 and MIT9313 (Supplementary Tables S1 and S2), suggesting that sRNAs are also important regulatory agents for Prochlorococcus iron metabolism.

18.name: MIT9313 cluster 18 (4 genes)

19.name: MIT9313 cluster 19 (2 genes)
19.functional_description: Enriched for genes including bcp, sigA/rpoD, crp, hli, iraI, idiA, isiB, and antisense RNAs. Includes iron stress response genes such as idiA and isiB.

supporting_quotes.quote: 19: bcp, sigA/rpoD, crp, hli, iraI, idiA, isiB, Yfr20, asRNA_04601, asRNA_07401 (63)
idiA is hypothesized to be a periplasmic iron-binding protein component of an iron ABC-transporter system... idiA was upregulated during iron stress and downregulated following rescue.

2.name: MIT9313 cluster 2 (10 genes)
2.functional_description: Contains genes including coaD and a possible porin, involved in transport functions.
2.confidence_notes: Enrichment p-value reported in example, assumed similar for this cluster based on gene content.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 2, coaD, some possible porin, Yfr7 (10)

2.assessment_notes: Enrichment p-value inferred from example cluster; exact p-value not explicitly stated.

23.name: MIT9313 cluster 23 (2 genes)
23.functional_description: Contains ferritin genes involved in iron storage, differentially expressed in MIT9313 during iron stress.

supporting_quotes.quote: One of the two ferritin genes in MIT9313 (PMT0499) was upregulated 16 h after iron deprivation, whereas the single ferritin gene in MED4 was not differentially expressed.

3.name: MIT9313 cluster 3 (12 genes)
3.functional_description: Contains hli genes involved in protection of photosystems from oxidative damage during iron stress.

supporting_quotes.quote: A large number of hli genes were differentially expressed in our experiments, including hli05/hli08 shared by both strains.

30.name: MIT9313 cluster 30 (11 genes)
30.functional_description: Includes petF (ferredoxin), rimI, gmk, cytochrome b6/f subunit VII, maf-like, and nitrogen transport genes, involved in electron transfer and transport.

supporting_quotes.quote: 30: petF, rimI, gmk, cytochrome b6/f subunit VII, maf-like, N transport (11)
Ferredoxin (petF) was downregulated and flavodoxin (isiB) upregulated during iron stress in both strains.

4.name: MIT9313 cluster 4 (24 genes)
4.functional_description: Contains genes including glyQ, piuC, idiA, pcbB, and isiB, involved in iron transport and stress response.

supporting_quotes.quote: The idiA region includes piuC and other iron stress induced genes upregulated in MIT9313 but absent in MED4.
